creator: rm@FreeBSD.org
text: Hello Joakim, thank you a lot for your submissions and sorry for a long delay. I'm closing this and setproctitle pr, because they're superseded by your 2.1.0 update, that's also have these changes included. I'm now working on your 2.1.0 patch (https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=264970) and will commit soon.
